featured.title: Use any AI model without signing in
featured.description: Bring your own key (BYOK) to use any language model in air-gapped environments, test web apps across devices, and create richer issue reports.

highlights.title: Learn VS Code
highlights.description: Build your skills with structured training modules with hands-on exercises and real-world examples.

highlights.title: Optimize your AI usage
highlights.description: Tips to help you get the most out of AI agents, while optimizing for cost and performance.

highlights.title: Build and test with browser agent tools
highlights.description: Let AI build web apps and automatically verify them in the integrated browser, catching and fixing bugs on its own.
